mapper.sql: select message_id, goods_id, order_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark from tr_trade_message
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_message
goods_id, order_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{goodsId}, #{orderId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{readStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update tr_trade_message set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where message_id = #{messageId}

update tr_trade_message set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where message_id in
#{messageId}
mapper.select: select c.peer_id as peer_id, u.nickname as peer_nickname, u.avatar as peer_avatar, c.goods_id as goods_id, g.title as goods_title, (select i.image_url from tr_trade_goods_image i where i.goods_id = c.goods_id and i.del_flag = '0' order by i.sort asc, i.image_id asc limit 1) as goods_cover_image, g.goods_status as goods_status, m.content as last_content, m.sender_id as last_sender_id, c.last_time as last_time, coalesce(unread.cnt, 0) as unread_count, (select o.order_id from tr_trade_order o where o.goods_id = c.goods_id and ((o.buyer_id = #{meId} and o.seller_id = c.peer_id) or (o.seller_id = #{meId} and o.buyer_id = c.peer_id)) and o.del_flag = '0' order by o.create_time desc limit 1) as order_id from ( select case when sender_id = #{meId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as peer_id, goods_id, max(message_id) as last_message_id, max(create_time) as last_time from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and (sender_id = #{meId} or receiver_id = #{meId}) and goods_id is not null group by peer_id, goods_id ) c join tr_trade_message m on m.message_id = c.last_message_id join tr_student_user u on u.user_id = c.peer_id and u.del_flag = '0' join tr_trade_goods g on g.goods_id = c.goods_id and g.del_flag = '0' left join ( select sender_id as peer_id, goods_id, count(*) as cnt from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and receiver_id = #{meId} and read_status = '0' and goods_id is not null group by sender_id, goods_id ) unread on unread.peer_id = c.peer_id and unread.goods_id = c.goods_id order by c.last_time desc

select message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_status, create_time from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and goods_id = #{goodsId} and ( (sender_id = #{meId} and receiver_id = #{peerId}) or (sender_id = #{peerId} and receiver_id = #{meId}) ) order by create_time desc

select c.peer_id as peer_id, u.nickname as peer_nickname, u.avatar as peer_avatar, 0 as goods_id, '管理员咨询' as goods_title, null as goods_cover_image, null as goods_status, m.content as last_content, m.sender_id as last_sender_id, c.last_time as last_time, coalesce(unread.cnt, 0) as unread_count, null as order_id from ( select case when sender_id = #{adminId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as peer_id, max(message_id) as last_message_id, max(create_time) as last_time from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and goods_id = 0 and (sender_id = #{adminId} or receiver_id = #{adminId}) group by peer_id ) c join tr_trade_message m on m.message_id = c.last_message_id join tr_student_user u on u.user_id = c.peer_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join ( select sender_id as peer_id, count(*) as cnt from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and receiver_id = #{adminId} and read_status = '0' and goods_id = 0 group by sender_id ) unread on unread.peer_id = c.peer_id order by c.last_time desc
select count(*) from tr_trade_message where del_flag = '0' and receiver_id = #{meId} and read_status = '0'
